apex_accelerators.name: APEX Accelerators (formerly PTAC)
apex_accelerators.notes: Free procurement training, SAM registration help, capability statement reviews. Nationwide network of 90+ offices.

afcea_events.name: AFCEA International Events
afcea_events.notes: Premier IT/cyber/comms events. TechNet Cyber, TechNet Augusta, West/AFCEA conferences. Must-attend for IT contractors.

same_events.name: SAME (Society of American Military Engineers)
same_events.notes: Essential for A/E, construction, environmental contractors. Federal Small Business Conference, regional events, JETC.

carahsoft_events.name: Carahsoft Technology Forums
carahsoft_events.notes: Free tech briefings, vendor showcases, government IT trends. Great for learning what agencies are buying.

gsa_interact.name: GSA Interact Events
gsa_interact.notes: Primary source for GSA Schedule holder events, buyer days, reverse industry days.

sba_events.name: SBA Events Calendar
sba_events.notes: 8(a), HUBZone, WOSB certification workshops, matchmaking, National Small Business Week.

sam_gov_events.name: SAM.gov Industry Days
sam_gov_events.notes: Pre-solicitation conferences, industry days announced via SAM. Search notice type 'Special Notice'.

govevents.name: GovEvents Calendar
govevents.notes: Comprehensive aggregator of government events. Searchable by agency, topic, location.

ndia_events.name: NDIA (National Defense Industrial Association)
ndia_events.notes: Defense industry conferences, chapter events. Ground Vehicle Systems, Armament Systems, Expeditionary Warfare.

ncma_events.name: NCMA (National Contract Management Association)
ncma_events.notes: Contract management training, World Congress, regional events. Great for meeting contracting officers.

act_iac.name: ACT-IAC Events
act_iac.notes: American Council for Technology - Industry Advisory Council. IT modernization, shared services, acquisition innovation.

psc_events.name: PSC (Professional Services Council)
psc_events.notes: Professional services industry events. Vision Federal Market Forecast, acquisition policy discussions.

dla_events.name: DLA Industry Engagement
dla_events.notes: Defense Logistics Agency events, commodity-specific industry days.

gsa_osdbu.name: GSA OSDBU Events
gsa_osdbu.notes: Small business programs, mentor-protege, Forecast of Opportunities briefings.

va_osdbu.name: VA OSDBU Events
va_osdbu.notes: SDVOSB verification, VA-specific programs, National Veterans Small Business Engagement.

dod_osbp.name: DOD OSBP Events
dod_osbp.notes: DoD-wide small business programs, Mentor-Protege events, Defense Manufacturing Conference.

navy_osbp.name: Navy OSBP Events
navy_osbp.notes: Navy-specific industry days, SeaPort events, Navy Gold Coast.

army_osbp.name: Army OSBP Events
army_osbp.notes: Army OSBP events, market research days, Army Small Business Forum.

air_force_osbp.name: Air Force OSBP Events
air_force_osbp.notes: USAF small business events, AFWERX challenges, SpaceWERX.

afwerx.name: AFWERX Innovation Events
afwerx.notes: SBIR/STTR open topics, Spark Tank, innovation challenges. Fast-track contracts.

hhs_osdbu.name: HHS OSDBU Events
hhs_osdbu.notes: NIH, CDC, FDA procurement events. HHS Small Business Expo.

nasa_osbp.name: NASA OSBP Events
nasa_osbp.notes: SBIR outreach, NASA industry days, Small Business Industry Day.

dhs_osdbu.name: DHS OSDBU Events
dhs_osdbu.notes: CBP, FEMA, Coast Guard events, DHS Industry Day.

doe_osdbu.name: DOE OSDBU Events
doe_osdbu.notes: National Labs events, clean energy initiatives, DOE Small Business Forum.

immixgroup.name: immixGroup Events
immixgroup.notes: IT reseller events, vendor showcases, government market education.

meritalk.name: MeriTalk Events
meritalk.notes: Government IT media events, cyber summits, cloud computing conferences.

govconwire.name: GovConWire Events
govconwire.notes: GovCon industry news events, executive spotlights, M&A discussions.

wipp.name: WIPP (Women Impacting Public Policy)
wipp.notes: Women-owned business advocacy, annual summit, policy updates.

wbenc.name: WBENC Events
wbenc.notes: Women's Business Enterprise certification, National Conference, matchmaking.

nmsdc.name: NMSDC Events
nmsdc.notes: Minority Business Enterprise certification, annual conference, corporate matchmaking.

industry_day.name: Industry Day
industry_day.description: Pre-solicitation event where agencies brief potential contractors on upcoming requirements
industry_day.actionRequired: Attend to learn requirements, submit questions, network with agency
industry_day.tip: These are the MOST valuable events - you learn what the agency wants before RFP release

pre_solicitation.name: Pre-Solicitation Conference
pre_solicitation.description: Formal briefing on upcoming solicitation details
pre_solicitation.actionRequired: Submit questions, understand evaluation criteria, identify teaming partners

matchmaking.name: Matchmaking Event
matchmaking.description: Speed dating style meetings with agency buyers and primes
matchmaking.actionRequired: Register early, prepare 60-second capability pitch, bring capability statements

training.name: Training/Workshop
training.description: Educational session on procurement process, compliance, proposals
training.actionRequired: Attend to learn, network with other contractors

certification.name: Certification Workshop
certification.description: Help with 8(a), HUBZone, WOSB, SDVOSB, MBE certification
certification.actionRequired: Attend if pursuing certification, bring documentation questions

conference.name: Industry Conference
conference.description: Large multi-agency event with exhibits, sessions, networking
conference.actionRequired: Network strategically, attend relevant sessions, schedule meetings in advance

sbir_sttr.name: SBIR/STTR Outreach
sbir_sttr.description: Small business innovation research proposal guidance and networking
sbir_sttr.actionRequired: Learn proposal process, meet program managers, identify topics

technology_briefing.name: Technology Briefing
technology_briefing.description: Vendor/reseller events showcasing solutions agencies are buying
technology_briefing.actionRequired: Learn what technologies agencies are adopting, find teaming partners

networking.name: Networking Event
networking.actionRequired: Build relationships, exchange cards, follow up within 48 hours

innovation.name: Innovation/Pitch Day
innovation.description: Rapid contracting events, pitch competitions, challenge-based acquisition
innovation.actionRequired: Prepare concise pitch, demonstrate capability, be ready for same-day award

majorAnnualConferences.name: AFCEA TechNet Cyber
majorAnnualConferences.value: Very High - Premier cyber event, DOD/DHS/IC buyers

majorAnnualConferences.name: AFCEA West
majorAnnualConferences.value: Very High - Navy/USMC focus, SeaPort opportunities

majorAnnualConferences.name: GSA Expo
majorAnnualConferences.value: Very High - GSA buyer access, Schedule updates

majorAnnualConferences.name: Navy Gold Coast
majorAnnualConferences.value: Very High - Direct Navy buyer access, matchmaking

new_contractor: Start with FREE APEX Accelerator training (formerly PTAC) - find yours at apexaccelerators.us
Attend SBA matchmaking events in your region
Don't pay for expensive conferences until you have a polished capability statement
Focus on Industry Days announced on SAM.gov for your target agencies
Carahsoft events are free and teach you what agencies are buying
established_contractor: AFCEA TechNet events are essential for IT/cyber contractors
SAME events are must-attend for A/E, construction, environmental
Prioritize Industry Days for recompete opportunities
GSA Expo is essential if you have a Schedule
Navy Gold Coast has excellent matchmaking for Navy work
Set up SAM.gov alerts for Industry Day notices in your NAICS
defense_contractor: AFCEA is the premier IT/cyber/comms networking organization
SAME is essential for engineering and construction
NDIA for weapons systems and defense platforms
AFWERX/SpaceWERX for innovation and rapid contracting
Service-specific OSBP events for targeted matchmaking
certification_seeking: VA OSDBU for SDVOSB verification events and requirements
SBA for 8(a) and HUBZone certification workshops
NMSDC for minority business enterprise certification
APEX Accelerators offer free certification guidance
it_contractor: AFCEA TechNet Cyber (May) - premier cyber event
ACT-IAC events for IT modernization trends
MeriTalk for cyber and cloud computing events
construction_contractor: SAME Federal Small Business Conference - matchmaking with USACE/NAVFAC
SAME JETC for military engineering community
GSA PBS events for civilian construction
APEX Accelerators for bonding and compliance training
